title: AstroCure
subtitle: AI-powered astrology intelligence without fear-based exploitation.
team: Solo founder with technical build ownership
summary: A trust-first astrology platform that replaces opaque, fear-driven consultations with calculation-grounded Vedic astrology insights, citations, and transparent reasoning.
problem: Millions of Indian astrology users cannot distinguish rigorous chart reasoning from cold reading, upselling, and anxiety loops.
decisionFocus: Replace the human marketplace incentive model with a calculation and RAG architecture that makes every insight traceable.
outcome: Pre-seed MVP in active development with the product thesis, market case, fraud model, user journeys, and technical architecture defined.

metrics.label: Customers served by a leading incumbent
metrics.context: Signals a massive behavior already migrated online.

metrics.label: Projected India astrology app CAGR
metrics.context: The fastest-growing geography in the category.

prd.title: AstroCure PRD
prd.subtitle: Product requirements, market case, fraud model, and MVP architecture.
prd.summary: A founder-written product document defining the trust problem in online astrology and the AI architecture needed to counter fear-based manipulation.
prd.decisionFocus: Frames fraud as an incentive-system problem and responds with transparent calculation, citations, and subscription-aligned incentives.

title: DocuMind
subtitle: Document intelligence for contracts and research papers.
domain: Legal AI, research workflows, document intelligence
summary: A dual-mode AI document intelligence platform that helps non-expert users understand legal agreements and research papers through grounded citations, risk scoring, and structured summaries.
problem: Freelancers, students, and small businesses routinely sign or study complex documents without being able to verify what matters.
decisionFocus: Use RAG over fine-tuning to prioritize traceability, build speed, and reliability for high-risk document comprehension.
outcome: Validated on 60 real documents with a 4.2/5 user clarity rating and a responsible decision-support positioning.

metrics.label: User clarity rating
metrics.context: Measured after users reviewed AI-assisted document outputs.

metrics.label: Build-time reduction
metrics.context: RAG was selected over fine-tuning for speed and reliability.

prd.title: DocuMind PRD
prd.subtitle: AI document intelligence platform for contracts and research papers.
prd.summary: A product requirements document covering user pain, competitive gaps, technical architecture, tradeoffs, and validation for a dual-mode AI comprehension product.
prd.decisionFocus: Makes traceability the product center: every output must link back to the source document so users can verify claims.

title: New Project Template
subtitle: Example entry showing fallback behavior before MDX is created.
summary: Create `content/case-studies/new-project-template.mdx` to publish this case study page.
problem: Placeholder project entry used to demonstrate content-first author workflow.
decisionFocus: The UI renders from projects.json even when content is not yet written.
outcome: When case study MDX is missing, the route shows a built-in coming-soon state.

metrics.label: Case-study MDX needed
metrics.context: Then add content file with matching slug.
